pinCode.subject: Your Evenero login code
pinCode.title: Your login code
pinCode.body: Use the code below to sign in to Evenero.
pinCode.expiry: This code is valid for 10 minutes.
pinCode.ignore: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

coHostInvite.subject: You're invited to co-host {{eventName}}
coHostInvite.title: You're invited as a co-host
coHostInvite.body: {{inviterName}} would like you to help host {{eventName}}.
coHostInvite.description: As a co-host, you'll help manage the event and the photo & video collection.
coHostInvite.permissionsList:
Approve or remove uploads
Change event settings
Download the full photo collection
Start the slideshow on a big screen
coHostInvite.viewGalleryLink: Or view the gallery without signing in
coHostInvite.dashboardNote: After signing in, you'll find this event on your dashboard.
coHostInvite.ignore: Don't recognize the sender? You can safely ignore this email.

eventReminder.subject: Share your photos from {{eventName}}
eventReminder.preheader: The gallery for {{eventName}} is waiting for your photos.
eventReminder.title: Ready to share your memories?
eventReminder.body: You set a reminder to upload photos from {{eventName}}. The gallery is waiting for you.
eventReminder.uploadPrompt: Add your photos and videos so everyone can relive the event together.
eventReminder.viewOthers: Take a look at what others have shared — you might spot moments you missed.
eventReminder.downloadHint: You can also download photos from the gallery.

reminderConfirmation.subject: Reminder set for {{eventName}}
reminderConfirmation.title: Your reminder is set
reminderConfirmation.body: We'll send you a reminder with the link to the {{eventName}} gallery.
reminderConfirmation.galleryLink: In the meantime, view the gallery here:
reminderConfirmation.changeReminder: Changed your mind? Just ignore the reminder when it arrives.

zipReady.subject: Your photo download is ready
zipReady.preheader: {{count}} files ({{size}} MB) from {{eventName}} ready to download.
zipReady.title: Your download is ready
zipReady.body: Your photo collection from {{eventName}} has been packaged and is ready.
zipReady.expiry: This link is valid for 7 days.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Evenero
welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: Thanks for joining Evenero. We're excited to help you collect and share memories.

features.title: What you can do:
features.create: Create events for weddings, parties, and more
features.collect: Collect photos from all your guests
